title: Manufacturing Engineer - Apollo Tyres Advisory Limited - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Apollo Tyres Advisory Limited - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Apollo Tyres Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Kolkata office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Apollo Tyres Advisory Limited:
Apollo Tyres Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Tyres Advisory Limited!
